name: Next Image Transformation
tagline: Drop-in replacement for Vercel's Nextjs image optimization service.
description:
Drop-in replacement for Vercel's Nextjs image optimization service.

Docs: https://github.com/coollabsio/next-image-transformation?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  next-image-transformation:
    image: ghcr.io/coollabsio/next-image-transformation:latest
    environment:
      - NODE_ENV=production
      - ALLOWED_REMOTE_DOMAINS=${ALLOWED_REMOTE_DOMAINS:-*}
      - IMGPROXY_URL=${IMGPROXY_URL:-http://imgproxy:8080}
    healthcheck:
      test: wget -qO- http://127.0.0.1:3000/health || exit 1
      interval: 2s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 5
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42072:3000
  imgproxy:
    image: darthsim/imgproxy
    environment:
      - IMGPROXY_ENABLE_WEBP_DETECTION=true
      - IMGPROXY_JPEG_PROGRESSIVE=true
      - IMGPROXY_USE_ETAG=true
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - imgproxy
        - health
      interval: 2s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 5
    restart: unless-stopped
